title: Create Cracking Contraptions: Reforged - Post Production
description: A Create Mod focused Modpack designed for the Create Cracking Contraptions SMP
body:
![Create Cracking Contraptions: Reforged - Post Productions Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b49d6cd9f177c4c585168ac10af3fe018d08f644.png)

# CREATE CRACKING CONTRAPTIONS: REFORGED - Post Production

Your Create Mod adventure starts here. This modpack is designed for engineers new & experienced to create the factories of their dreams. Or to just have fun with all the other mods this pack has to offer!
 
You'll spawn in a beautifully generated Regions Unexplored/Tectonic world filled with Yung's Better structures & other modded structures to explore. You're only limitation going forward is your imagination!

Centered around the Create mod & many of its addons, Create Cracking Contraptions offers a unique Vanilla+ experience based in Forge. All mods were carefully chosen for this pack to fit well into the Create Mod's ecosystem. As your progress in your world, tedious vanilla tasks can be eliminated by creating different machines and factories to allow you to focus on modded content over the vanilla grind.
